commit_scope: Normalize awareness agent origin node ids into valid runtime node ids.

commands: for p in codex claude grok; do python3 scripts/awareness_node_daemon.py --profile "$p" --once --dry-run --identify --wake-reason 'walking toward wholeness joy and vitality'; done
local_validation.summary: Awareness daemon tests passed. Codex, Claude, and Grok dry-runs each produced a 16-character runtime node id, including Grok.

deploy_validation.details: Live Grok wake proof pending deploy.

phase_gate.reason: Local proof is complete; PR, CI, and deploy proof remain pending.

evidence_refs: scripts/awareness_node_daemon.py dry-run identity output for codex, claude, and grok
